folders.docs: Long-form notes, drafts, and shared project documents
folders.prototypes: Prototype code, experiments, and design explorations
folders.assets: Images, PDFs, datasets, and other binary assets
folders.team: Shared contacts, roles, and collaboration metadata
folders.skills: Reusable agent/team playbooks and local skills
folders.workspace: Workspace-level agent instructions, docs, and companion files

contract.skills: Each module keeps copied skills in <module>/skills/ so cloned agents can read them locally.
contract.docs: Each module keeps supporting docs in <module>/docs/.
contract.files: Each module keeps non-markdown companion files in <module>/files/.
contract.writing: Writing resources are scoped per paper at writing/<writing_id>/skills|docs|files.
